persona.name: Craving-Control Struggler
persona.pain_en: Daily cravings break every weight plan.
persona.desire_en: Steady appetite control without feeling deprived.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs visible early control over snack urges.
persona.pain_hi: Daily cravings break every weight plan.
persona.desire_hi: Steady appetite control without feeling deprived.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs visible early control over snack urges.

EN.headline: I stopped thinking about snacks all day.
EN.support_line: Once cravings came down, staying on track felt much easier.
EN.context_line: For people whose day falls apart after one craving, this shows a simpler way forward.

HI.headline: I stopped thinking about snacks all day.
HI.support_line: Once cravings came down, staying on track felt much easier.
HI.context_line: For people whose day falls apart after one craving, this shows a simpler way forward.

persona.name: Busy Professional

persona.desire_en: Simple weight routine that fits packed days.
persona.friction_en: Meal prep and long workouts are not sustainable.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs a low-effort protocol that still shows progress.
persona.pain_hi: Work schedule leaves no room for complex routines.
persona.desire_hi: Simple weight routine that fits packed days.
persona.friction_hi: Meal prep and long workouts are not sustainable.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs a low-effort protocol that still shows progress.

EN.headline: I could follow this on busy workdays.

EN.context_line: For people with packed days and messy eating, this fits real life.

HI.headline: I could follow this on busy workdays.

persona.pain_hi: Stress triggers emotional snacking at random times.

HI.headline: I stopped stress eating so often.

persona.pain_hi: Weight loss plateaus despite repeated effort.

persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs a trackable, structured restart path.
